steps: Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567
Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty rate of 15% was correctly applied but custodian paid excess net amount
Submit formal reclaim with calculation showing expected net CAD 231,030 vs received CAD 235,107
Escalate to RBC's dividend operations team if initial contact doesn't resolve within 10 business days

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
Skatteetaten – Reduced WHT on Dividends for Foreign Shareholders
